examples.title: Basic Inheritance and Method Overriding
examples.description: Demonstrates inheritance where a derived class inherits from a base class and overrides its method
examples.explanation:
1. Animal is the base class with a virtual speak() method
2. Dog and Cat inherit from Animal using ': public Animal'
3. Each derived class provides its own implementation of speak()
4. The virtual keyword enables runtime polymorphism

examples.title: Polymorphism with Base Class Pointers
examples.description: Shows runtime polymorphism using base class pointers to call derived class methods
examples.explanation:
1. Shape is an abstract base class with pure virtual function area()
2. Circle and Rectangle inherit from Shape and provide area() implementation
3. Base class pointer (Shape*) can hold addresses of derived class objects
4. At runtime, correct area() method is called based on actual object type
5. Virtual destructor ensures proper cleanup of derived objects
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) where n is number of shapes

examples.title: Multi-level Inheritance with Runtime Polymorphism
examples.description: Advanced example demonstrating multi-level inheritance hierarchy with virtual functions
examples.explanation:
1. Employee is abstract base class with pure virtual calculateBonus()
2. Manager inherits from Employee, Developer inherits from Employee
3. SeniorManager inherits from Manager (multi-level inheritance)
4. Each class overrides calculateBonus() with different bonus logic
5. Base class pointer array demonstrates runtime polymorphism
6. Virtual destructor ensures proper cleanup through base pointer
